## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`

## Accessibility and Responsive Checklist (US-DEV-501)

- [ ] Keyboard-only navigation validated on changed screens (Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter/Space, Escape).
- [ ] Screen-reader labels and landmarks verified for changed screens (headings, form labels, button names).
- [ ] Responsive behavior checked on mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints for changed screens.
- [ ] Any identified WCAG 2.1 AA issue is fixed or documented as follow-up with scope and owner.
